title: Tunisian Shiso Salad with Grassy Dressing
description: A refreshing Japanese-inspired salad featuring the flavors of Tunisia, paired with a light and tangy dressing made with grassy notes.

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: olive oil infused with Tunisian spices

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the grassy, shiso, and leaf.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the tagine and gooey.
3. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
